body_text:
22:27 â October 21, 2022
CEBA Repayment Notification Update
CEBA eligibility criteria validations have been completed for all applicants and the results of these validations are final. These validations were conducted in partnership with the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA). They were revalidated periodically since the launch of CEBA in April 2020 to ensure an accurate reflection of the information in CRA records. The repayment assignment is based on the reason the CEBA loan application didnât meet the eligibility criteria.
Information about your business members who were assigned a repayment plan is available in ServiceNow under My Company in the new CEBA Application Repayment Plan category.
Once you receive information indicating the type of repayment plan a business member has been assigned to, you need to let them know. You can use the repayment message templates provided by EDC.
Please see the table below for more information
.
If your business members require clarity about their ineligibility, they can call the CEBA Call Centre at 1-888-324-4201. The CEBA Call Centre is available Monday to Friday from 9:00 am to 6:00 pm ET, excluding statutory holidays. Although the CEBA Call Centre can provide clarity, they wonât accept disputes, challenges, or escalations as they donât have the authority to grant exceptions to CEBA eligibility criteria.
We also updated content to clarify that the fiscal quarterly calculation periods donât always fall on the same date as the examples provided in the manual. You can find the exact dates for each quarter on the Calculation Period List provided with the CEBA Loan Administration Fee Report in ServiceNow.
Central 1 Banking Services Volume
CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and Reconciliation Part
Section 1.2, Contacts and Websites
We advised that you can contact EDC for Intralinks setup instructions. Intralinks is a secure, one-way repository that EDC uses to share documents with external clients. If you donât already have access to Intralinks, contact EDC.
Section 5.1, Overview of Reporting CEBA Loan Administration Fees
We clarified that the dates for fiscal quarterly calculation periods can differ slightly. Refer to the Calculation Period List provided with the CEBA Loan Administration Fee Report for specific dates.
Section 6.1, Overview of Reviewing Submitted Reports in ServiceNow
We updated the image displaying the CEBA categories under My Company in ServiceNow.
Section 6.2, Repayment Categories
We added a description for the âCEBA Application Repayment Planâ category which indicates the repayment plans your business members have been assigned to (âEarly Repayment Requiredâ or âStandard Repayment Termsâ, as applicable).
